creator: info@rickvanderzwet.nl
text:
The php5-rrdtool is no longer referenced by the authors main website:

   http://oss.oetiker.ch/rrdtool/download.en.html

Their alternative is databases/pecl-rrd

I hereby like to request removed of databases/php5-rrdtool and provide databases/pecl-rrd as alternative.

Fix: * remove databases/php5-rrdtool
* Add attached entries to UPDATING and MOVED, attached a diff.

Patch attached with submission follows:
